rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Elec. Code §254.130, which governs where political committees file campaign finance reports.
quote: reports filed under this subchapter shall be filed with the authority with whom the political committee's campaign treasurer appointment is required to be filed.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and election code reporting-filing authority provision.
